summary: APK build attempt and instrumented test scaffolding

apk_build.reason: Android AAPT2 daemon mode doesn't work through QEMU x86_64 emulation on ARM64. The AAPT2 binary runs but daemon mode fails.
apk_build.workaround: Use x86_64 CI environment (GitHub Actions) for full APK builds

github_actions.build_job: Builds SDK AAR and Sample APK

approaches_tried: QEMU user-mode emulation for x86_64 binaries - Partial success (command-line works)
AAPT2 wrapper scripts - Created but daemon mode fails
binfmt_misc kernel registration - Permission denied in container
arm64_aapt2_investigation.conclusion: AAPT2 daemon mode requires native execution or proper kernel-level binfmt support. Recommended to use x86_64 CI runners.

next_actions: Push to GitHub and enable Actions for full APK build
Run instrumented tests in CI on Android emulator
